questionText: Has your emissions accounting methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition changed in the reporting year?
questionKo: 보고연도 기간 중, 배출량 산정방법론, 조직 경계 및/또는 보고연도에 대한 정의가 변경되었습니까?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Changes in emissions calculation methodology, reporting boundary approach, and/or reporting year could result in a significant impact on the base year emissions and compromise the consistency and relevance of a company's GHG emissions inventory. This question provides data users with important context to any changes in emissions that may trigger base year emissions recalculation.

columns.text: Change(s) in methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition?
options: Yes, a change in reporting year definition
No, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response(s)
columns.popup_help: C1: "Please note, "No" should not be selected in addition to any other option"
columns.textKo: 방법론, 조직경계 및/또는 보고연도 정의 변경 여부
optionsKo: Yes, a change in 보고연도 definition
No, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response(s)
columns.popup_helpKo: C1: "Please note, "No" 해야 합니다 not be 선택 in addition to 하나 이상 other option"

columns.text: Details of methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition change(s)
columns.textKo: 방법론, 조직경계 및/또는 보고연도 정의 변경에 대한 세부 정보

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "No" in response to 7.1.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "아니요" in response to 7.1.

guidance.text:
Change(s) in methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition? (column 1)
Select all change(s) that occurred in the reporting year. If none of the changes occurred in the reporting year, select "No".
Further details on each of the options are provided below:
Change in methodology: This refers to changes that occurred due to modifications in the way that the emissions inventory is calculated, e.g., changes in emissions factors used or changes in methodology protocol followed.
Change in boundary: This refers to changes to the boundary used for your emissions inventory calculations, e.g., changing your consolidation approach from financial control to operational control. This option could also apply if you incorporated facilities, activities, or Scope 3 categories into your inventory in the reporting year that were excluded in previous years, or if you have insourced or outsourced an activity (see page 105 of the GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain standard ).
Change in reporting year definition: This refers to a change in how your organization defines the reporting year, e.g., changing from a reporting year which aligns with the calendar year to one which aligns with your fiscal year.
Discovery of significant errors: This refers to either the discovery of significant errors, or the discovery of a number of errors that are collectively significant.
Details of methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition change(s) (column 2)
This column appears if any option except "No" is selected in column 1.
Provide further details of the changes selected in column 1. For example, briefly describe how and why your emissions calculation methodology changed, and/or explain the context to any discovered errors. If new facilities have been included within your inventory, please list these, including their location. If you have included new Scope 3 categories in your inventory, please specify the categories added.
Note for organizations with significant land sector activities in their operations or value chain and/or that choose to account for and report CO2 removals:
If you have calculated emissions in line with the GHG Protocol Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) and Guidance for the first time, select "Yes, a change in methodology" and provide further details in column "Details of methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition change(s)"
guidance.textKo: Change(s) in 방법론, boundary, 및/또는 보고연도 definition? (열 1) Select all change(s) that occurred in the 보고연도. 만약 none 의 changes occurred in the 보고연도, select "아니요". Further details on each 의 options are 입력 below: Change in 방법론: This refers to changes that occurred due to modifications in the way that the emissions inventory is calculated, e.g., changes in emissions factors used 또는 changes in 방법론 protocol followed. Change in boundary: This refers to changes to the boundary used 귀사의 emissions inventory calculations, e.g., changing your consolidation approach from financial control to operational control. This option could also apply 만약 you incorporated facilities, activities, 또는 Scope 3 categories into your inventory in the 보고연도 that were excluded in previous years, 또는 만약 you have insourced 또는 outsourced an activity (see page 105 의 GHG Protocol Corporate 가치사슬 standard ). Change in 보고연도 definition: This refers to a change in how 귀사 defines the 보고연도, e.g., changing from a 보고연도 which aligns with the calendar year to one which aligns with your fiscal year. Discovery of significant errors: This refers to either the discovery of significant errors, 또는 the discovery of a number of errors that are collectively significant. Details of 방법론, boundary, 및/또는 보고연도 definition change(s) (열 2) This 열 appears 만약 하나 이상 option except "아니요" is 선택 in 열 1. Provide further details 의 changes 선택 in 열 1. For example, briefly 설명 how 및 why your emissions calculation 방법론 changed, 및/또는 explain the context to 하나 이상 discovered errors. 만약 new facilities have been included within your inventory, please list these, 포함 their location. 만약 you have included new Scope 3 categories in your inventory, 직접 입력 the categories added. Note for organizations with significant land sector activities in their operations 또는 가치사슬 및/또는 that choose to account for 및 report CO2 removals: 만약 you have calculated emissions in line with the GHG Protocol Land Sector 및 Removals Standard (LSRS) 및 Guidance 에 대한 first time, select "Yes, a change in 방법론" 및 provide further details in 열 "Details of 방법론, boundary, 및/또는 보고연도 definition change(s)"

change.question_ko: 보고 연도에 배출량 회계 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의가 변경되었습니까 ? M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의에 변경 사항이 있습니까 ? 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의 변경에 대한 세부 정보 해당 사항 모두 선택 예 , 방법론 변경 예 , 경계 변경 예 , 보고 연도 정의 변경 아니요 , 하지만 이전 답변에서 중대한 오류가 발견됨 아니요 최대 2,500 자 작성

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Changes in emissions calculation 방법론, 보고경계 approach, 및/또는 보고연도 could result in a significant impact on the 기준연도 emissions 및 compromise the consistency 및 relevance of a company's 온실가스 배출량 inventory. This 문항 provides 데이터 사용자 with important context to 하나 이상 changes in emissions that may trigger 기준연도 emissions recalculation.
